heading: Loan information to be disclosed and model disclosure form for covered institutions, institution-affiliated organizations, and lenders participating in preferred lender arrangements
label: 1019b Loan information to be disclosed and model disclosure form for covered institutions, institution-affiliated organizations, and lenders participating in preferred lender arrangements
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (a)(2)(B)(ii), was in the original “section 128(e)”, and was translated as meaning , which is classified to , to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Section 1638(e) of title 15section 128(e) of Pub. L. 90–321section 1638(e) of title 15

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Not later than 18 months after , the Secretary, in coordination with the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, shall determine the minimum information that lenders, covered institutions, and institution-affiliated organizations of such covered institutions participating in preferred lender arrangements shall make available regarding education loans described in that are offered to students and the families of such students.August 14, 2008section 1019(3)(A) of this title

children.heading: Consultation and content of minimum disclosures
children.label: B Consultation and content of minimum disclosures
i
children.text: consult with students, the families of such students, representatives of covered institutions (including financial aid administrators, admission officers, and business officers), representatives of institution-affiliated organizations, secondary school guidance counselors, lenders, loan servicers, and guaranty agencies;

children.label: ii
children.text: include, in the minimum information under subparagraph (A) that is required to be made available, the information that the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System requires to be disclosed under , modified as necessary to apply to such loans; andsection 1638(e)(1) of title 15

children.label: I
children.text: The interest rate and terms and conditions of the loan for the next award year, including loan forgiveness and deferment.

children.label: aa
children.text: collected by the lender at or prior to the disbursal of the loan, including whether the charges will be deducted from the proceeds of the loan or paid separately by the borrower; or

children.label: bb
children.text: paid in whole or in part by the lender.

children.label: III
children.text: The annual and aggregate maximum amounts that may be borrowed.

children.label: IV
children.text: The average amount borrowed from the lender by students who graduated from such institution in the preceding year with certificates, undergraduate degrees, graduate degrees, and professional degrees, as applicable, and who obtained loans of such type from the lender for the preceding year.

children.label: aa
children.text: borrowers of loans made under ;section 1078 of this title

children.label: bb
children.text: borrowers of loans made under section 1078–2 or 1078–8 of this title, who pay the interest while in school; and

children.label: cc
children.text: borrowers of loans made under section 1078–2 or 1078–8 of this title, who do not pay the interest while in school.

children.label: VI
children.text: The consequences for the borrower of defaulting on a loan, including limitations on the discharge of an education loan in bankruptcy.

children.label: VII
children.text: Contact information for the lender.

children.label: VIII
children.text: Other information suggested by the persons and entities with whom the Secretary has consulted under clause (i).

children.label: i
children.text: provide that the information determined under paragraph (1) shall be disclosed by covered institutions, and institution-affiliated organizations of such covered institutions, with preferred lender arrangements to prospective borrowers and the families of such borrowers regarding the education loans described in that are offered pursuant to such preferred lender arrangements; andsection 1019(3)(A) of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: make clear that such covered institutions and institution-affiliated organizations may provide the required information on a form designed by the institution or organization instead of the model disclosure form described in subparagraph (B);

children.label: i
children.text: is easily usable by students, families, institutions, institution-affiliated organizations, lenders, loan servicers, and guaranty agencies; and

children.label: ii
children.text: is similar in format to the form developed by the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System under paragraphs (1) and (5)(A) of section 1638(e) of title 15, in order to permit students and the families of students to easily compare private education loans and education loans described in ; and1section 1019(3)(A) of this titleSee References in Text note below.1

children.label: C
children.text: update such model disclosure form periodically, as necessary.

children.heading: Duties of lenders
children.label: b Duties of lenders
children.text: Each lender that has a preferred lender arrangement with a covered institution, or an institution-affiliated organization of such covered institution, with respect to education loans described in shall annually, by a date determined by the Secretary, provide to such covered institution or such institution-affiliated organization, and to the Secretary, the information the Secretary requires pursuant to subsection (a)(2)(A)(i) for each type of education loan described in that the lender plans to offer pursuant to such preferred lender arrangement to students attending such covered institution, or to the families of such students, for the next award year.section 1019(3)(A) of this titlesection 1019(3)(A) of this title

children.heading: Duties of covered institutions and institution-affiliated organizations
children.label: c Duties of covered institutions and institution-affiliated organizations

children.heading: Providing information to students and families
children.label: 1 Providing information to students and families
i
children.text: The information the Secretary requires pursuant to subsection (a)(2)(A)(i), for each type of education loan described in offered pursuant to a preferred lender arrangement to students of such institution or the families of such students.section 1019(3)(A) of this title

children.label: I
children.text: In the case of a covered institution, the information that the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System requires to be disclosed under to the covered institution, for each type of private education loan offered pursuant to such preferred lender arrangement to students of such institution or the families of such students.section 1638(e)(11) of title 15

children.label: II
children.text: In the case of an institution-affiliated organization, the information the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System requires to be disclosed under , for each type of private education loan offered pursuant to such preferred lender arrangement to students of the institution with which such organization is affiliated or the families of such students.section 1638(e)(1) of title 15

children.heading: Timely provision of information
children.label: B Timely provision of information
children.text: The information described in subparagraph (A) shall be provided in a manner that allows for the students or the families to take such information into account before selecting a lender or applying for an education loan.

children.label: i
children.text: the information described in clauses (i) and (ii) of paragraph (1)(A); and

children.label: ii
children.text: a detailed explanation of why such covered institution or institution-affiliated organization entered into a preferred lender arrangement with the lender, including why the terms, conditions, and provisions of each type of education loan provided pursuant to the preferred lender arrangement are beneficial for students attending such institution, or the families of such students, as applicable; and

children.label: B
children.text: ensure that the report required under subparagraph (A) is made available to the public and provided to students attending or planning to attend such covered institution and the families of such students.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Each covered institution, and each institution-affiliated organization of such covered institution, that has a preferred lender arrangement, shall comply with the code of conduct requirements of subparagraphs (A) through (C) of .section 1094(a)(25) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: comply with the code of conduct developed and published by such covered institution under subparagraphs (A) and (B) of ;section 1094(a)(25) of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: if such institution-affiliated organization has a website, publish such code of conduct prominently on the website; and

children.label: iii
children.text: administer and enforce such code of conduct by, at a minimum, requiring that all of such organization’s agents with responsibilities with respect to education loans be annually informed of the provisions of such code of conduct.
